title: Jsdoin 12 Inch 100 Packs Rainbow Party Balloons, Assorted Multicoloured Latex Balloons with 2 Rolls of Ribbon for Birthday Party Wedding Baby Shower
features: [Pack of 100 Rainbow Balloons] -- 100pcs 12-inch thickened latex mixed-color balloons, 2.8g per balloon, sturdy and durable, less likely to break.
[Not Just Balloons] -- We also equip each balloon set with 2pcs 10-meter ribbons make it easier for you to tie the balloons and decorate them.

[Great Props for Decorating Parties] -- You can hang or stick the balloons on the wall, door or anywhere else you want to decorate. Balloons can be used for birthday parties, wedding anniversaries, baby showers, graduation parties and other party occasions. , create a happy atmosphere.
[Need to Pay Attention] -- Avoid direct sunlight on the balloon, stay away from sharp objects and excessive friction, children under three years old need to be supervised when playing.
